intended_use: cvi42 is intended to be used by qualified medical professionals for viewing, post-processing and quantitative evaluation of cardiovascular magnetic resonance (MR) images and cardiovascular computed to
intended_use_full: cvi42 is intended to be used by qualified medical professionals for viewing, post-processing and quantitative evaluation of cardiovascular magnetic resonance (MR) images and cardiovascular computed tomography (CT) images in a Digital Imaging and Communications in Medicine Standard format, for the purpose of obtaining diagnostic information as part of a comprehensive diagnostic decision-making process
target_condition: Cardiovascular disease; cardiac dysfunction; coronary artery disease with calcification; myocardial deformation abnormalities
ground_truth: Analytical phantoms with known deformation fields; realistic phantoms with artificially imposed deformation; real MRI data
